# Bot Inventory — autogenerated 2026-04-19
> Read-only audit. Do not hand-edit. Regenerate via Claude Code.

## Summary
- Total handlers: 16 (14 conversation flows + 2 join-by-code handlers, all in `lib/whatsapp/flows.ts`)
- Total outbound message templates: 31 (deduplicated, counted by unique body string)
- Conversation state keys in use: `action`, `pollaId`, `pollaSlug`, `matchId`, `matchIndex`, `totalMatches`, `page`, `joinCode`, `expires`
- Distinct `action` values observed: `browsing_polla`, `picking_match`, `waiting_prediction`, `confirm_prediction`, `waiting_join_confirm`
- External APIs called: WhatsApp Cloud API v21.0 (`graph.facebook.com/v21.0`), Supabase (service-role admin client)
- Indirect external work via helpers: football-data.org (via `lib/matches/ensure-fresh.ts` → `/api/matches/sync-recent`)
- Files analyzed: 9

## Entry points
One row per inbound webhook event shape. The router lives in
`lib/whatsapp/bot.ts` and dispatches from two places: `processIncomingMessage`
(top-level text + interactive entry) and `routePayload` (payload id
routing for `interactive` replies).

| Incoming event | Router branch | Handler |
|---|---|---|
| GET `/api/whatsapp/webhook?hub.mode&hub.verify_token&hub.challenge` | `app/api/whatsapp/webhook/route.ts` GET | Returns `challenge` if token matches `META_WA_WEBHOOK_VERIFY_TOKEN`; else 403 |
| POST `/api/whatsapp/webhook` (any body) | `app/api/whatsapp/webhook/route.ts` POST | HMAC verify, parse, call `processIncomingMessage` |
| (any inbound) — pending OTP row exists | `bot.ts:198-221` | Inline: `sendCTAButton` with OTP + `/verify` link, `markOTPSent`. Not a named handler. |
| (any inbound) — user not in `public.users` | `bot.ts:232` | `handleUnknownUser` |
| text: `codigo` / `código` | `bot.ts:251` | Inline: `generateOTP` + `sendTextMessage(getOTPMessage(otp))` |
| text matches `/^(\d{1,2})-(\d{1,2})$/` AND state.action === `waiting_prediction` | `bot.ts:272` | `handlePredictionInput` |
| text === `cancelar` AND state.action === `waiting_prediction` | `bot.ts:263` | `handleCancelPrediction` |
| text contains `/unirse/<slug>` or `/pollas/<slug>` | `bot.ts:299` | `handleJoinPolla` |
| text matches `/^unirse\s+([a-z0-9]{6})$/` | `bot.ts:311` | `handleJoinByCode` |
| state.action === `waiting_join_confirm` AND text === `si`/`sí`/`yes` | `bot.ts:322` | `handleJoinByCode` (with state.joinCode) |
| state.action === `waiting_join_confirm` AND text === `no` | `bot.ts:327` | Inline: `clearState` + "Listo parce..." text |
| text matches `/^[abcdefghjklmnpqrstuvwxyz23456789]{6}$/` (bare 6-char code) | `bot.ts:340` | `handleJoinByCodeConfirm` |
| text === `ayuda` / `help` | `bot.ts:347` | `handleHelp` |
| text === `perfil` / `profile` | `bot.ts:353` | `handleProfile` |
| text in `["hola","hi","inicio","menu","menú"]` | `bot.ts:359` | `handleMainMenu` |
| text fallback | `bot.ts:364-369` | `sendTextMessage("🤔 Parce, no entendí bien...")` |
| interactive payload `menu` | `bot.ts:422` | `handleMainMenu` |
| interactive payload `menu_mis_pollas` / `mis_pollas` | `bot.ts:428` | `handleMisPollas` |
| interactive payload `menu_predecir` / `pronosticar` | `bot.ts:433` | `handleMisPollas` (aliased, intentional) |
| interactive payload `menu_tabla` / `tabla` | `bot.ts:438` | `handleMisPollas` (aliased, intentional) |
| interactive payload starts with `polla_<id>` | `bot.ts:443` | `handlePollaMenu` |
| interactive payload starts with `pred_<id>` or `pred_next_<id>` | `bot.ts:449` | `handlePronosticar` |
| interactive payload starts with `more_<pollaId>_<page>` | `bot.ts:456` | `handlePronosticar` (paginated) |
| interactive payload starts with `match_<id>` | `bot.ts:465` | `handlePronosticar(specificMatchId)` via state |
| interactive payload starts with `rank_<id>` | `bot.ts:479` | `handleLeaderboard` |
| interactive payload starts with `results_<id>` | `bot.ts:485` | `handleResults` |
| interactive payload `confirm_yes` | `bot.ts:492` | `handleConfirmPrediction` |
| interactive payload `confirm_no` | `bot.ts:500` | `handlePronosticar` (returns to polla match list) |
| interactive payload `join_code_yes` | `bot.ts:401` | `handleJoinByCode` (uses state.joinCode) |
| interactive payload `join_code_no` | `bot.ts:413` | Inline: `clearState` + text |
| interactive payload `menu_ayuda` | `bot.ts:509` | `handleHelp` |
| interactive payload starts with `help_<topic>` | `bot.ts:514` | `handleHelpTopic` |
| interactive payload `menu_perfil` / `help_perfil` | `bot.ts:520` | `handleProfile` |
| interactive payload fallback | `bot.ts:525` | `handleMainMenu` |

## Handlers

### handleMainMenu (lib/whatsapp/flows.ts:190)
- **Triggers:** text `"hola" | "hi" | "inicio" | "menu" | "menú"` (lowercased), interactive payloads `menu` and the default fallback. Display name check at `flows.ts:192-194` treats any string of 8-15 digits as "parcero" to avoid greeting a phone number.
- **State in:** none
- **State out:** cleared on button press via router's `keepState` gate (not inside the handler)
- **DB reads:** none
- **DB writes:** none (indirect via `logMessage` for the outbound send)
- **External calls:** WhatsApp interactive reply-buttons send
- **Outbound messages:**
  ```
  Hey {name} qué vamos a hacer hoy parce?
  ```
  with buttons `Mis Pollas 🏆` / `Predecir ⚽` / `Ver Tabla 📊`, header `"La Polla 🐥"`, footer `"La Polla Colombiana 🐥"`.
- **Error paths:** none explicit; underlying `sendInteractive` throws on Meta API !ok.
- **Related comments:** none.

### handleUnknownUser (lib/whatsapp/flows.ts:211)
- **Triggers:** any inbound from a phone not present in `public.users` (checked at `bot.ts:222-233`).
- **State in:** none
- **State out:** none
- **DB reads:** none (user lookup performed by caller before dispatch)
- **DB writes:** none
- **External calls:** one text send + one CTA button send to `APP_URL` (root)
- **Outbound messages:**
  ```
  ¡Hola parce! 👋 Bienvenido a La Polla 🐔

  Todavía no tenés cuenta, pero eso se arregla en 30 segundos.
  Tocá el botón de abajo y armá tu cuenta para empezar a jugar 👇
  ```
  ```
  ¡Listo parce! Creá tu cuenta acá 🎯
  ```
  (button label: `Registrarme 🐔` → `{APP_URL}`)
- **Error paths:** none.
- **Related comments:** none.

### handleMisPollas (lib/whatsapp/flows.ts:229)
- **Triggers:** interactive payloads `menu_mis_pollas` / `mis_pollas` / `menu_predecir` / `pronosticar` / `menu_tabla` / `tabla` (all aliased to this handler at `bot.ts:428-441`); and from `handleHelpTopic` for `help_pollas` / `help_predicciones` / `help_tabla`.
- **State in:** none
- **State out:** none
- **DB reads:**
  - `polla_participants: select(polla_id, total_points, rank, role, status) where user_id = userId AND status = 'approved'`
  - `pollas: select(id, name, tournament, status) where id IN (pollaIds) AND status = 'active'`
  - `polla_participants: select(polla_id) where polla_id IN (pollaIds)` (counts)
- **DB writes:** none
- **External calls:** one text + one CTA button (both paths) OR one list message when pollas exist.
- **Outbound messages:**
  ```
  😅 Parce, no estás en ninguna polla todavía.

  _Unite a una o creá una nueva desde la web_
  ```
  ```
  Dale, creá tu polla y armá el parche 🐥
  ```
  ```
  😴 No tenés pollas activas en este momento parce.

  _Creá una nueva y armá el parche_
  ```
  ```
  Dale, creá una polla nueva 🐥
  ```
  ```
  Escoge cuál polla querés ver parce 👇
  ```
  (list rows: `{pollaName}` / `{trnLabel} · {count} jugadores · {points} pts`, payload id `polla_{id}`)
- **Error paths:** No DB error branch; if rows are empty, falls through to the zero-pollas CTA.
- **Related comments:** none.

### handlePollaMenu (lib/whatsapp/flows.ts:310)
- **Triggers:** interactive payload `polla_<id>`.
- **State in:** none (but sets state for downstream continuations)
- **State out:** sets `{ action: "browsing_polla", pollaId, pollaSlug }`
- **DB reads:** via `verifyMemberAndPolla`:
  - `pollas: select by id`
  - `polla_participants: select by polla_id + user_id (maybeSingle)`
- **DB writes:** none
- **External calls:** one reply-buttons send
- **Outbound messages:** two variants depending on `polla.status`:
  ```
  🏆 *{polla.name}*

  ⚽ Torneo: {trnLabel}
  📊 Tu posición final: *#{rank}*
  🎯 Tus puntos: *{points}*

  Esta polla ya terminó parce. Solo podés ver los resultados finales.
  ```
  (buttons: `Ver Tabla 📊` / `Resultados ⚽`)
  ```
  🏆 *{polla.name}*

  ⚽ Torneo: {trnLabel}
  📊 Tu posición: *#{rank}*
  🎯 Tus puntos: *{points}*

  ¿Qué querés hacer parce?
  ```
  (buttons: `Predecir 🎯` / `Ver Tabla 📊` / `Resultados ⚽`)
- **Error paths:** `verifyMemberAndPolla` emits its own Spanish messages for polla-not-found / not-participant / digital-pool-unpaid and returns null.
- **Related comments:** `// RULE 4 — ended pollas are read-only (no Predecir)` (flows.ts:322)

### handlePronosticar (lib/whatsapp/flows.ts:360)
- **Triggers:** interactive payloads `pred_<id>`, `pred_next_<id>`, `more_<pollaId>_<page>`, `match_<id>` (via state), and `confirm_no` (returns to list).
- **State in:** For `match_<id>` only, reads state.pollaId from `browsing_polla` / `picking_match`.
- **State out:** sets `{ action: "picking_match", pollaId, pollaSlug, page }` on the list view, or `{ action: "waiting_prediction", pollaId, matchId, matchIndex, totalMatches }` via `showPredictionPrompt` when auto-advanced.
- **DB reads:** calls `verifyMemberAndPolla` then:
  - `matches: select(id, home_team, away_team, flags, scheduled_at) where status='scheduled' AND scheduled_at > lockWindow (now+5min) AND (id IN match_ids OR tournament = polla.tournament)`
  - `predictions: select(match_id) where polla_id + user_id`
  - In `showPredictionPrompt`: `predictions: select(predicted_home, predicted_away) where polla_id + user_id + match_id (maybeSingle)`
- **DB writes:** none (writes happen in `handlePredictionInput` / `handleConfirmPrediction`)
- **External calls:** one text (no-matches path) OR one reply-buttons OR one list message with up to 10 rows (9 matches + optional pagination row).
- **Side effects:** fire-and-forget `void ensureMatchesFresh()` on entry (flows.ts:367)
- **Outbound messages:**
  ```
  😴 No hay partidos pendientes para pronosticar parce.

  _Pilas, te aviso cuando haya nuevos_
  ```
  (buttons: `⬅️ Volver` → `polla_{id}`, `🏠 Menú` → `menu`)
  ```
  Ese partido no está en esta polla parce, seleccioná uno de la lista.
  ```
  ```
  ¿Cuál partido querés predecir parce? ⚽{opcional " (página N)"}
  ```
  (list rows: `{homeTeam} vs {awayTeam}` / `{date}{ · ✅ Ya pronosticaste?}`, optional tail row `Ver más partidos →`)

  From `showPredictionPrompt` (not exported):
  ```
  ⚽ *{homeFlag} {home} vs {awayFlag} {away}*

  🏆 {polla.name} — Partido {i}/{total}
  📅 {date}

  Ya pronosticaste este partido parce.
  Tu pronóstico actual: *{home} {ph} - {pa} {away}*

  Escribí un nuevo marcador para actualizarlo, o mandá *cancelar* para dejarlo igual.
  ```
  ```
  ⚽ *{homeFlag} {home} vs {awayFlag} {away}*

  🏆 {polla.name} — Partido {i}/{total}
  📅 {date}

  Escribí el resultado así:
  *2-1* _(local primero)_

  _Tenés hasta {date} para predecir_ ⏰
  ```
- **Error paths:** `verifyMemberAndPolla` emits its own messages; ended-polla short-circuit emits:
  ```
  Esta polla ya terminó parce. Solo podés ver los resultados finales.
  ```
- **Related comments:** `// RULE 8 — filter by polla.match_ids (not tournament)` (flows.ts:383), `// RULE 1 — 5min lock check` (in prediction handlers), `// leave 1 slot in the 10-row list for "Ver más partidos"` (flows.ts:18)

### handleCancelPrediction (lib/whatsapp/flows.ts:580)
- **Triggers:** text `cancelar` while `state.action === "waiting_prediction"` (bot.ts:263).
- **State in:** `{ action: "waiting_prediction", pollaId, matchId }`
- **State out:** reset when `handlePollaMenu` is re-entered at the end.
- **DB reads:**
  - `matches: select(home_team, away_team) by id`
  - `predictions: select(predicted_home, predicted_away) where polla_id + user_id + match_id (maybeSingle)`
- **DB writes:** none
- **External calls:** one text send, then re-enters `handlePollaMenu`.
- **Outbound messages:**
  ```
  Listo parce, dejé tu pronóstico como estaba (*{home} {ph} - {pa} {away}*)
  ```
  ```
  Listo parce, cancelé.
  ```
- **Error paths:** none.
- **Related comments:** descriptive header comment at flows.ts:577-579.

### handlePredictionInput (lib/whatsapp/flows.ts:616)
- **Triggers:** text matching `/^(\d{1,2})-(\d{1,2})$/` while state.action === `waiting_prediction` (bot.ts:272, after 0-20 range check at bot.ts:282).
- **State in:** `{ action: "waiting_prediction", pollaId, matchId }`
- **State out:** sets `{ action: "confirm_prediction", pollaId, matchId, matchIndex: predictedHome, totalMatches: predictedAway }` — **overloads `matchIndex`/`totalMatches` as carriers for the h/a prediction**, documented inline via context (flows.ts:648-654). Keep an eye on this when adding new state fields.
- **DB reads:** `matches: select(id, home_team, away_team, scheduled_at, status) by id`
- **DB writes:** none (write happens in `handleConfirmPrediction`)
- **External calls:** one reply-buttons send
- **Outbound messages:**
  ```
  🤔 Parce, no encontré el partido.
  ```
  ```
  Este partido ya está cerrado parce, no se pueden cambiar pronósticos a menos de 5 minutos del inicio.
  ```
  ```
  ¿Confirmás tu predicción? 🎯

  {homeFlag} *{home}* *{ph}* - *{pa}* *{away}* {awayFlag}
  ```
  (buttons: `✅ Confirmar` → `confirm_yes`, `❌ Cambiar` → `confirm_no`)
- **Error paths:** two explicit branches above (missing match, lock window).
- **Related comments:** `// RULE 1 — 5min lock check before confirming` (flows.ts:637)

### handleConfirmPrediction (lib/whatsapp/flows.ts:673)
- **Triggers:** interactive payload `confirm_yes` while state.action === `confirm_prediction` (bot.ts:492).
- **State in:** `{ action: "confirm_prediction", pollaId, matchId, matchIndex (=predictedHome), totalMatches (=predictedAway) }`
- **State out:** cleared on next button press.
- **DB reads:** `matches: select(id, home_team, away_team, scheduled_at, status) by id`
- **DB writes:** `predictions: upsert(polla_id, user_id, match_id, predicted_home, predicted_away, submitted_at) onConflict (polla_id, user_id, match_id)`
- **External calls:** one reply-buttons send
- **Outbound messages:**
  ```
  🤔 Parce, no encontré el partido.
  ```
  ```
  Este partido ya está cerrado parce, no se pueden cambiar pronósticos a menos de 5 minutos del inicio.
  ```
  ```
  ❌ Uy parce, hubo un error guardando tu pronóstico. Intentá de nuevo.
  ```
  ```
  ✅ ¡Listo parce! Guardé tu pronóstico: {homeFlag} *{home}* *{ph}* - *{pa}* *{away}* {awayFlag}

  _Eso es, a esperar el partido_ 🐥
  ```
  (buttons: `Siguiente ➡️` → `pred_next_{pollaId}`, `🏠 Menú` → `menu`)
- **Error paths:** match-not-found, lock window, DB upsert error.
- **Related comments:** `// RULE 1 — re-check the 5min lock at confirm time. The DB trigger is the ultimate gate, but checking here avoids the generic "error guardando" UX.` (flows.ts:701-702)

### handleLeaderboard (lib/whatsapp/flows.ts:751)
- **Triggers:** interactive payload `rank_<id>`.
- **State in:** none
- **State out:** cleared by router
- **Side effects:** fire-and-forget `void ensureMatchesFresh()` on entry (flows.ts:756)
- **DB reads:**
  - `polla_participants: select(user_id, total_points, rank, users(display_name)) where polla_id order by rank ASC limit 5`
  - `predictions: select(user_id) where polla_id AND user_id IN (top5)`
  - If user not in top 5: `polla_participants: select(total_points, rank) where polla_id + user_id`
  - If user not in top 5: `users: select(display_name) where id = userId`
- **DB writes:** none
- **External calls:** one text send with the formatted table (via `formatTablaWA`), then one CTA button to `{APP_URL}/polla/{polla.id}` (NOTE: this URL is `/polla/{id}` not `/pollas/{slug}` — likely a typo, see Known Issues).
- **Outbound messages:**
  ```
  😅 No hay participantes en esta polla aún parce.
  ```
  ```
  {formatTablaWA output — triple-backtick monospace 5 rows}
  ```
  ```
  _Dale clic para ver la tabla completa con todos los jugadores_ 👇
  ```
  (button label `Ver tabla completa 📊` → `{APP_URL}/polla/{polla.id}`)
- **Error paths:** no explicit DB error branches; falls through on empty results.
- **Related comments:** none.

### handleResults (lib/whatsapp/flows.ts:848)
- **Triggers:** interactive payload `results_<id>`.
- **State in:** none
- **State out:** cleared by router
- **Side effects:** fire-and-forget `void ensureMatchesFresh()` on entry (flows.ts:853)
- **DB reads:**
  - `matches: select(id, home_team, away_team, home_score, away_score, flags) where status='finished' AND (id IN match_ids OR tournament = polla.tournament) order by scheduled_at DESC limit 5`
  - `predictions: select(match_id, predicted_home, predicted_away, points_earned) where polla_id + user_id + match_id IN (matchIds)`
  - `polla_participants: select(total_points) where polla_id + user_id`
- **DB writes:** none
- **External calls:** one text send
- **Outbound messages:**
  ```
  😴 No hay resultados disponibles aún parce.

  _Pilas, te aviso cuando se jueguen partidos_
  ```
  (buttons: `⬅️ Volver` / `🏠 Menú`)

  Composed output (all in one text send):
  ```
  ⚽ *Últimos resultados — {polla.name}*

  {homeFlag} *{home}* *{hs}* - *{as}* *{away}* {awayFlag}
  _Tu pronóstico: {ph}-{pa} → ✅ +{pts} pts_ | _Tu pronóstico: {ph}-{pa} → ❌ 0 pts_ | _Sin pronóstico_ 😅

  ... (repeat per match)

  💰 *Total acumulado: {totalPoints} pts*
  ```
- **Error paths:** none.
- **Related comments:** `// RULE 8 — last 5 finished matches scoped to polla.match_ids when set` (flows.ts:860)

### handleJoinPolla (lib/whatsapp/flows.ts:939)
- **Triggers:** text containing `/unirse/<slug>` or `/pollas/<slug>` (bot.ts:299). **Slug regex:** `/\/(?:unirse|pollas)\/([a-z0-9-]+)/`.
- **State in:** none
- **State out:** none
- **DB reads:**
  - `pollas: select(id, name, slug, status, type, payment_mode, buy_in_amount) where slug`
  - `polla_participants: select(id) where polla_id + user_id (maybeSingle)`
- **DB writes:** `polla_participants: insert(polla_id, user_id, role='player', status='approved', payment_status, paid, total_points=0)` — payment_status depends on `payment_mode === 'digital_pool' && buy_in > 0`.
- **External calls:** one text OR one reply-buttons OR one CTA button depending on branch.
- **Outbound messages:**
  ```
  🤔 Parce, no encontré una polla con ese link.
  ```
  ```
  😅 La polla *{polla.name}* ya no está activa parce.
  ```
  ```
  Esa polla es privada parce, necesitás invitación del admin para entrar.
  ```
  ```
  ¡Parce, ya sos parte de *{polla.name}*! 🐥

  _Dale, poné tus pronósticos_
  ```
  (buttons: `Predecir 🎯` / `Ver Tabla 📊`)
  ```
  ❌ Uy parce, hubo un error al unirte. Intentá de nuevo.
  ```
  ```
  🎉 ¡Listo parce! Te registré en *{polla.name}*

  Ahora pagá la cuota en la app para que tus pronósticos cuenten 👇
  ```
  (CTA: `Pagar y pronosticar` → `{APP_URL}/pollas/{slug}`)
  ```
  🎉 ¡Listo parce! Ya sos parte de *{polla.name}*

  Eso es, ahora poné tus pronósticos y demostrá quién sabe de fútbol 🐥⚽
  ```
  (buttons: `Predecir 🎯` / `🏠 Menú`)
- **Error paths:** polla-not-found, polla-not-active, polla-closed (private), insert error.
- **Related comments:** `// Post-migration-010: no more 'pending' participant status. Everyone lands as approved; digital_pool gates predictions via payment_status='pending'.` (flows.ts:1003-1004)

### handleHelp (lib/whatsapp/flows.ts:1051)
- **Triggers:** text `ayuda` / `help`; interactive payload `menu_ayuda`; also the fallback when `handleHelpTopic` falls through.
- **State in:** none
- **State out:** cleared by router
- **DB reads:** none
- **DB writes:** none
- **External calls:** one list message with 2 sections (Mis cosas / Cómo funciona).
- **Outbound messages:**
  ```
  Escoge una opción parce 👇
  ```
  (list rows: `Mis pollas` / `Mis predicciones` / `Ver tabla` / `Mi perfil` / `¿Cómo se puntúa?` / `Crear una polla`, header `"¿En qué te ayudo?"`)
- **Error paths:** none.
- **Related comments:** none.

### handleHelpTopic (lib/whatsapp/flows.ts:1105)
- **Triggers:** interactive payloads starting with `help_` (bot.ts:514).
- **State in:** none
- **State out:** none
- **DB reads:** none directly
- **DB writes:** none
- **External calls:** depends on topic:
  - `help_puntaje`: one text send
  - `help_crear`: one CTA button to `/pollas/crear`
  - `help_pollas` / `help_predicciones` / `help_tabla`: delegates to `handleMisPollas`
  - anything else: delegates to `handleHelp`
- **Outbound messages:**
  ```
  🎯 *¿Cómo se puntúa en La Polla?*

  *3 pts* — Resultado exacto (ej: dijiste 2-1 y fue 2-1) 🔥
  *1 pt* — Acertaste quién ganó o si fue empate ✅
  *0 pts* — No le pegaste 😅

  _Pilas parce, cada punto cuenta para la tabla_ 📊
  ```
  ```
  Creá tu polla desde la web, es bacano y rapidito 🐥

  _Elegí torneo, poné el nombre y compartile el link al parche_
  ```
  (CTA: `Crear mi polla 🏆` → `{APP_URL}/pollas/crear`)
- **Error paths:** none.
- **Related comments:** **Inconsistency** — help_puntaje says 3/1/0 pts but the actual scoring per `supabase/migrations/004_fix_scoring_function.sql` is 5/3/2/1/0 (exact / winner+diff / winner only / one team exact / nothing). Flagged in Known Issues.

### handleProfile (lib/whatsapp/flows.ts:1154)
- **Triggers:** text `perfil` / `profile`; interactive payloads `menu_perfil` / `help_perfil`.
- **State in:** none
- **State out:** cleared by router
- **DB reads:**
  - `users: select(display_name) by id`
  - `polla_participants: select(polla_id, total_points, rank) where user_id`
  - `predictions: select(id) where user_id`
- **DB writes:** none
- **External calls:** one text send + one CTA button to `{APP_URL}/perfil`.
- **Outbound messages:**
  ```
  🐥 *Tu Perfil*

  👤 *{name}*
  📊 Pollas activas: *{activeCount}*
  🎯 Predicciones: *{predCount}*
  🏆 Mejor posición: *#{bestRank or —}*

  _Visitá tu perfil completo para ver más stats_
  ```
  ```
  Dale, mirá todos tus datos 👇
  ```
  (button: `Ver perfil 👤` → `{APP_URL}/perfil`)
- **Error paths:** none.
- **Related comments:** none.

### handleJoinByCodeConfirm (lib/whatsapp/flows.ts:1218)
- **Triggers:** bare 6-char text matching `/^[abcdefghjklmnpqrstuvwxyz23456789]{6}$/` (bot.ts:340). **Flagged bare-pattern trigger.** Expected false positives: any 6-char word in the join alphabet (the source comment acknowledges "ordinary words rarely match. Remaining false positives get dismissed with 'no'").
- **State in:** none
- **State out:** sets `{ action: "waiting_join_confirm", joinCode }`
- **DB reads:** none
- **DB writes:** none
- **External calls:** one text (format reject) OR one reply-buttons confirmation send
- **Outbound messages:**
  ```
  Parce, ese código no tiene el formato correcto. Deben ser 6 letras o números.
  ```
  ```
  ¿Querés unirte a la polla con el código *{CODE}*?
  ```
  (buttons: `Sí, unirme` → `join_code_yes`, `No` → `join_code_no`)
- **Error paths:** validate-format-fails branch.
- **Related comments:** `// Sends the user a SI/NO confirmation before joining with a bare code.` (flows.ts:1213-1216)

### handleJoinByCode (lib/whatsapp/flows.ts:1243)
- **Triggers:**
  - text `/^unirse\s+([a-z0-9]{6})$/` (bot.ts:311)
  - state.action === `waiting_join_confirm` AND text `si`/`sí`/`yes` (bot.ts:322)
  - interactive payload `join_code_yes` when state has `joinCode` (bot.ts:401)
- **State in:** optional `{ action: "waiting_join_confirm", joinCode }` (when called from the confirmation paths)
- **State out:** `clearState(phone)` at entry (flows.ts:1248)
- **DB reads / writes:** delegated to `lib/pollas/join.ts::joinByCode`. Inside that helper:
  - Reads: `otp_rate_limits` count by phone+`attempt_type='join_code'`; `pollas` by `join_code`; `polla_participants` by polla+user
  - Writes: `otp_rate_limits` insert (rate attempt); `polla_participants` insert on success
- **External calls:** one CTA button send (success) OR one text send (each error case).
- **Outbound messages:** (success path)
  ```
  ¡Te uniste a *{polla.name}*! 🎉

  Mirá la polla en la app 👇
  ```
  (button: `Abrir polla 🐔` → `{APP_URL}/pollas/{slug}`)

  Error path texts, keyed by `JoinByCodeResult.code`:
  ```
  Parce, ese código no tiene el formato correcto. Deben ser 6 letras o números.
  ```
  ```
  Muchos intentos seguidos parce. Esperá 10 minutos y volvés a probar.
  ```
  ```
  Ese código no existe. Pedile al admin de la polla que te lo mande de nuevo.
  ```
  ```
  Esa polla ya no acepta nuevos jugadores.
  ```
  ```
  Ya sos parte de esa polla parce.
  ```
- **Error paths:** all 5 enum cases above.
- **Related comments:** `// Performs the join. Shared with the web endpoint via lib/pollas/join.ts.` (flows.ts:1239-1241)

## Conversation state machine

- **Storage backend:** in-process `Map<string, ConversationState>` (`lib/whatsapp/state.ts:21`).
- **TTL:** `STATE_TTL = 10 * 60 * 1000` ms (10 minutes). Evaluated lazily on `getState` — expired entries are deleted on access, not proactively.
- **Eviction:** only on `getState` miss (lazy) or on `clearState(phone)`. No periodic sweep.
- **Scale note:** because the store lives in process memory, any serverless cold start, worker recycle, or horizontal scale-out drops state. Acceptable per the file header comment: `// Fine for MVP; move to Supabase if needed.` (state.ts:2).

### Fields

| Field | Type | Set by | Read by |
|---|---|---|---|
| `action` | `string` (discriminator) | all `setState` callers | all `getState` callers |
| `pollaId` | `string \| undefined` | most flows | `handlePollaMenu`, `handlePronosticar`, `handleCancelPrediction`, `handlePredictionInput`, `handleConfirmPrediction`, `match_` router branch, `confirm_no` router branch |
| `pollaSlug` | `string \| undefined` | `handlePollaMenu`, `handlePronosticar` | unused (dead field today; set but not read) |
| `matchId` | `string \| undefined` | `showPredictionPrompt`, `match_` router branch, `handlePredictionInput` | `handleCancelPrediction`, `handleConfirmPrediction` |
| `matchIndex` | `number \| undefined` | `showPredictionPrompt` (real index), `handlePredictionInput` (**overloaded as predictedHome**) | `handleConfirmPrediction` (reads as predictedHome) |
| `totalMatches` | `number \| undefined` | `showPredictionPrompt` (real total), `handlePredictionInput` (**overloaded as predictedAway**) | `handleConfirmPrediction` (reads as predictedAway) |
| `page` | `number \| undefined` | `handlePronosticar` (picking_match state) | `handlePronosticar` paginated branch |
| `joinCode` | `string \| undefined` | `handleJoinByCodeConfirm` | text SI/NO branch + `join_code_yes` payload branch |
| `expires` | `number` (ms epoch) | `setState` wrapper adds TTL | `getState` check |

### Observed `action` values

- `browsing_polla` — set by `handlePollaMenu`. Read: none explicit. Mostly used as a marker that a polla is pinned for the next interaction.
- `picking_match` — set by `handlePronosticar` list branch. Read: none explicit.
- `waiting_prediction` — set by `showPredictionPrompt` (from `handlePronosticar`) and by `match_<id>` router branch. Read: bot.ts text handler branch (validates `NN-NN` or `cancelar`).
- `confirm_prediction` — set by `handlePredictionInput`. Read: `confirm_yes` router branch.
- `waiting_join_confirm` — set by `handleJoinByCodeConfirm`. Read: text SI/NO branch and `join_code_yes` router branch.

### Clear points

- Explicit `clearState` calls:
  - `handleJoinByCode` (flows.ts:1248)
  - bot router: SI/NO "no" text branch (bot.ts:328)
  - bot router: `join_code_no` payload branch (bot.ts:414)
  - bot `routePayload` at entry unless payload is a continuation (bot.ts:396), continuation list being: `pred_next_*`, `match_*`, `more_*`, `confirm_yes`, `confirm_no`, `join_code_yes`, `join_code_no`.
- Implicit (by TTL): after 10 minutes of no access.
- Implicit (by process restart): any serverless cold boot.

## All regex patterns

| Pattern | File:line | What it matches | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `/^\d{8,15}$/` | flows.ts:192 (applied to `displayName.replace("+","")`) | Any phone-like 8–15 digit string | Used to detect when `display_name` is actually a phone number so `handleMainMenu` greets the user as "parcero" instead. |
| `/^(\d{1,2})-(\d{1,2})$/` | bot.ts:272 | Score input like `2-1` (each side 1–2 digits) | Used only while state is `waiting_prediction`. |
| `/\/(?:unirse\|pollas)\/([a-z0-9-]+)/` | bot.ts:302 | Slug after `/unirse/` or `/pollas/` | Triggered when body contains either substring (bot.ts:299). |
| `/^unirse\s+([a-z0-9]{6})$/` | bot.ts:311 | `unirse XXXXXX` — explicit join-by-code | Applied after `body.toLowerCase()`. 6-char group is permissive (any letter or digit). `handleJoinByCode` defers to `validateJoinCodeFormat`, which rejects `0/o/i/1`. |
| `/^[abcdefghjklmnpqrstuvwxyz23456789]{6}$/` | bot.ts:340 | Bare 6-char join-code alphabet | **Flagged bare-pattern trigger.** Source comment at bot.ts:337-339: "The lowercased alphabet mirrors JOIN_CODE_ALPHABET (no 0/o/i/1) so ordinary words rarely match. Remaining false positives get dismissed with 'no'." |

No other regex patterns in the bot surface.

## Known issues and TODOs

Grep of `lib/whatsapp/**` + `app/api/whatsapp/**` for `TODO|FIXME|XXX|HACK|@ts-ignore|eslint-disable`:

- `app/api/whatsapp/webhook/route.ts:79` — `// eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any` (the next line casts Meta's webhook payload to `any` to pull `entry`/`changes`/`value`/`messages`). Low risk: just untyped access to a well-known upstream shape.
- `app/api/whatsapp/test-send/route.ts:18` — `// TODO: Replace with your test phone number (Colombian format: 57XXXXXXXXXX)` — placeholder sentinel. Safe because the endpoint already gates on `NODE_ENV !== "production"` plus `META_WA_WEBHOOK_VERIFY_TOKEN` secret.
- `lib/whatsapp/**` — zero matches.

Inconsistencies and latent issues observed while producing this inventory (no grep hit, but worth surfacing):

1. **Stale scoring copy in `handleHelpTopic help_puntaje`** (flows.ts:1110-1118). Copy says 3/1/0 pts. Actual scoring in `supabase/migrations/004_fix_scoring_function.sql` is 5/3/2/1/0 (exact / winner+diff / winner / one-team-exact / nothing). The web UI uses the correct tiers via `lib/scoring.ts`.
2. **Broken leaderboard CTA URL** (flows.ts:841). Points at `{APP_URL}/polla/{polla.id}` (singular `polla/` with a polla UUID), whereas live app routes use `/pollas/{slug}`. Will 404 / redirect for users tapping "Ver tabla completa".
3. **Unused exports in `lib/whatsapp/messages.ts`** — `getWelcomeMessage`, `getErrorMessage`, `getMatchReminderMessage` are exported but have no caller in the current bot pipeline. Dead code or reserved for future use.
4. **`pollaSlug` state field is set but never read** (state.ts:9; set at flows.ts:320 and 471). Set during `browsing_polla` and `picking_match`, never consumed.
5. **`matchIndex`/`totalMatches` overload** (flows.ts:648-654 vs 685-686). These fields carry different semantics in different actions: in `picking_match` they are legit index counters; in `confirm_prediction` they carry `predictedHome` and `predictedAway`. Works today but fragile — any future field-naming change needs to know both uses.
6. **In-memory state across serverless cold starts** — documented in `state.ts:2` as "Fine for MVP". A user mid-flow on an instance that recycles will see their next text fall through to the fallback "🤔 Parce, no entendí bien…".
7. **Signature verification soft-fails in dev** (webhook/route.ts:55-60). If `META_WA_APP_SECRET` is unset, the webhook logs a warning and accepts the body. Production env has the secret set per recent `vercel env ls`.
8. **Meta API URL built at module load** (bot.ts:37 and interactive.ts:6). If `META_WA_PHONE_NUMBER_ID` is unset at boot, the URL becomes `.../v21.0/undefined/messages` and every send fails at runtime with a 404 from Graph. Existing env checks (`bot.ts:30-35`) warn but do not hard-fail.

## Files analyzed

1. `app/api/whatsapp/webhook/route.ts` (109 lines) — webhook entry, HMAC verification, dispatch to `processIncomingMessage`.
2. `app/api/whatsapp/send/route.ts` (31 lines) — authenticated helper to send a raw text message via the bot's sender.
3. `app/api/whatsapp/test-send/route.ts` (45 lines) — dev-only interactive-message smoke tester.
4. `lib/whatsapp/bot.ts` (527 lines) — sender functions, Meta API call, message logging, `processIncomingMessage`, `routePayload`.
5. `lib/whatsapp/flows.ts` (1293 lines) — all 16 named handlers + `verifyMemberAndPolla` + `showPredictionPrompt` + team-flag map.
6. `lib/whatsapp/interactive.ts` (120 lines) — `sendReplyButtons`, `sendListMessage`, `sendCTAButton` helpers (wrap `sendInteractive`).
7. `lib/whatsapp/state.ts` (39 lines) — in-memory `Map` state store with 10-min TTL.
8. `lib/whatsapp/messages.ts` (16 lines) — 4 static message templates; only `getOTPMessage` is currently reached from the bot pipeline.
9. `lib/whatsapp/tabla.ts` (72 lines) — monospace leaderboard formatter used by `handleLeaderboard`.

Cross-referenced (read but not deeply inventoried — they are helper surfaces outside the bot): `lib/supabase/admin.ts`, `lib/utils/otp.ts` (exports `generateOTP`, `findPendingOTP`, `markOTPSent`, `validateOTP`), `lib/matches/ensure-fresh.ts`, `lib/pollas/join.ts`, `lib/pollas/join-code.ts`.
